title: Mace Smash Glass
description: Instantly break glass with a mace!
body:
## Mace Smash Glass
Instantly break glass with a Mace. 

![Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4195a9de1c2cc45a00cb061ef4dd71022e907544.png)

### Description
- This mod makes Mace both a weapon and a tool
- Break glass, tinted glass and panes instantly with a Mace (no efficiency/haste needed)
- You can put Silk Touch on a Mace to get the glass back
- Mace now takes only 1 damage to durability when mining (compared to 2 in Vanilla), this is further improved by using the Unbreaking enchantment.

### Creative mode
- You can now find Mace under tools in the creative menu
- Hiting blocks with a Mace in creative mode will now break them
